positive: A symmetrical, abstract forest scene rendered in negative space style. The main subject is a highly stylized grouping of diverse bioluminescent mushrooms and delicate woodland flora, forming a central, interlocking mandala pattern. The colors are limited to deep indigo, vivid cyan, electric magenta, and pure white luminescence against a solid, stark black background. The composition must feature strong, clean silhouettes and dramatic high-contrast lighting, making the entire design suitable for a seamless, repeating print on apparel. Use intricate line work, dot patterns, and geometric abstraction to define the edges. Minimalist, ethereal, spiritual, woodcut print style. Central composition, perfect symmetry.
negative: blur, grain, photorealism, noise, text, words, watermark, logo, signature, messy, low contrast, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, smudge, solid background, realistic shadows
